name: forum-anon-registry
docs: Anonymous forum membership registry for LP-0016.
Handles member commitment storage, N-of-M moderation certificates,
and threshold slash with retroactive deanonymization via Shamir reconstruction.

instructions.name: Initialize
docs: Create a new forum instance with a fixed moderator set and threshold parameters.

args.name: threshold_n
args.docs: Number of moderator signatures required per moderation certificate.

args.name: threshold_k
args.docs: Number of moderation certificates required to trigger a slash.

args.name: stake_required
args.docs: Minimum stake (base units) required at member registration.

args.name: initial_root
args.docs: Initial Merkle root (zero if no members at creation).

instructions.name: Register
docs: Register a new member. Records commitment, member_tag, staked amount,
and Shamir share commitments for future slash reconstruction.

args.name: member_tag
args.docs: SHA256('forum/v1/member-tag:' || id_secret || forum_id). Stable per member×forum.

args.name: shamir_commitments
args.docs: SHA256('forum/v1/share-commit:' || index || value) for each Shamir share.

instructions.name: UpdateMerkleRoot
docs: Update the forum's Merkle root after one or more registrations.

instructions.name: SubmitModerationCert
docs: Submit a moderation certificate against a member_tag.
Verifies N-of-M Ed25519 signatures. Increments the member's strike count.
Does NOT slash — slash is triggered separately once strike_count >= threshold_k.

instructions.name: Slash
docs: Submit K moderation certificates and K Shamir shares.
Verifies all certs (N signatures each), reconstructs id_secret via Lagrange over GF(2^8),
verifies commitment, revokes member, and claims stake.

instructions.name: RejectNullifier
docs: Explicitly record a post nullifier as spent, rejecting duplicate posts.

instructions.name: VerifyPost
docs: Verify a Risc0 zkVM membership proof for an anonymous post.
Checks the proof's merkle_root matches the on-chain root,
the member is not revoked, and the post_nullifier has not been used.

types.name: MemberRecord
docs: Per-member state stored in the registry.

fields.name: signature
docs: Ed25519 signature over SHA256('forum/v1/vote:' || forum_id || content_hash || member_tag || reason)

types.name: ModerationCert
docs: Aggregated N-of-M moderation certificate.

types.name: SlashData
docs: Payload for a slash transaction: K certs + K Shamir shares.

types.name: MembershipProof
docs: Public journal output from the Risc0 zkVM membership circuit.

types.name: RegistryState
docs: Full on-chain state for one forum instance.

errors.name: ForumAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Forum account has already been initialised.

errors.name: MemberAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: A member with this commitment is already registered.

errors.name: InsufficientStake
errors.msg: Staked amount is below the forum minimum.

errors.name: InvalidMerkleRoot
errors.msg: Submitted Merkle root does not match on-chain root.

errors.name: DuplicateNullifier
errors.msg: This post nullifier has already been used.

errors.name: MemberRevoked
errors.msg: The member has been revoked and cannot post.

errors.name: MemberNotFound
errors.msg: No registered member with this member_tag.

errors.name: InsufficientVotes
errors.msg: Certificate does not reach the N-of-M threshold.

errors.name: InvalidSignature
errors.msg: One or more moderator signatures failed verification.

errors.name: UnknownModerator
errors.msg: Signer is not in the forum's moderator set.

errors.name: InvalidShare
errors.msg: A Shamir share does not match its on-chain commitment.

errors.name: CommitmentMismatch
errors.msg: Reconstructed id_secret does not hash to the stored commitment.
